sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for this Tier 3 empirical game

special_mechanics.name: Event-Based Gameplay
special_mechanics.description: Game features multiple Olympic-style sports events with distinct physics: 400 Meter Hurdles (head-to-head), Hammer Throw (individual), Swimming (head-to-head), Roof Top Jumping (individual), and Fighting Scene (head-to-head)

special_mechanics.name: Character Stats System
special_mechanics.description: Each team member has individual strengths and weaknesses suited to different events

special_mechanics.name: Power-up System
special_mechanics.description: Players can purchase items from mall to enhance character performance during events using collected medals

tier_notes: Tier 3 empirical/qualitative data. Sources provide game design and localization information but contain no specific physics parameters, movement values, gravity constants, or jump mechanics documentation. This is a sports competition game where physics varies by event type rather than following standard platformer movement rules.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Crash 'n the Boys: Street Challenge
Wikipedia - Crash 'n' the Boys: Street Challenge
